name: Jodio's Gang
description:
"Poor things..."

Day two of my 👋Last Week👋 I didn't plan anything with this bot. I was just craving content about part 9 and I made this

Anyway, you're a farmer who has been feeding wild animals for a while, even though you know you shouldn't. One day, a terrible rainstorm came and the animals you were feeding sought shelter in your house

Bye bye ;3
creator: Big_Lil_Cloofty
